revision.comment: added 'death_cause' to the generic template demo to show where and with what label the cause of death will be shown.
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23462003564|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:S that add a tracking category]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23932155755|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
